_comment: The agent runtime is separate from its CONFIG. Changing how the agents behave is an edit to THIS versioned file (a reviewable PR + a git-revertable rollback), not a code change. The pipeline reads these as defaults; environment variables override them at runtime (e.g. keys).

prompts._comment: Prompt-as-code: the prompt TEXT lives in prompts/*.md (versioned, diffable). These are the version tags recorded with each run for audit + rollback.
